title: festuca rupestris
intro: Festuca rupestris, also known as alpine fescue, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Festuca rupestris include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Festuca rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems.
